app.title: MuJoCo – Advanced Physics Simulation
app.author: modinfo
app.description: High-performance physics engine for modeling and simulating complex systems
proposed_tests: Clone the repository, build and run the MuJoCo server, verify output matches example
Use MuJoCo to simulate a 3D model, measure simulation speed and accuracy
Compare MuJoCo's performance against similar physics engines
